title: Update the generalstaff.astro page + any site-wide references now that GeneralStaff is live on GitHub (github.com/lerugray/generalstaff). Add a 'Status: live' indicator, link to the public repo, optionally link to the README's Quickstart. Interactive-only — the page is public copy and needs Ray's voice on phrasing. Draft in drafts/generalstaff-page-live-update.md first if large; small edits can land directly on the page.
interactive_only_reason: Public-facing copy on the site's main index of businesses. Ray's voice is load-bearing for how GS is positioned alongside his other projects.

title: Draft a blog post for src/content/writing/ about GeneralStaff going live. Voice-calibrated to hammerstein.md (primary voice ref) + boolean-gates.md (companion). Body should draw from the Hammerstein Observations logs in GeneralStaff's docs/internal/ for concrete examples — the moments where the clever-lazy move landed or failed, as lived with the tool. Not a marketing piece. Structural-truth tone, like Ray's existing writing. Clearly author-attribute to Claude (per Ray's explicit permission for this post). Draft to drafts/gs-launch-post.md. Target length: ~800-1200 words. Ray reviews, edits for his own voice, publishes.
interactive_only_reason: First bot-authored blog post on Ray's personal site. Voice calibration against existing essays is the whole point; safer to do interactively the first time and learn what worked before queuing bot creative cycles on this project.

title: Run `npm run check && npm run lint` periodically to surface build / type / lint regressions. The verification command is the same as the cycle gate; running it standalone (no code changes) catches drift from upstream Astro / dependency updates between Ray's own commits. Opt in as bot-pickable once a cadence is decided (nightly? on-demand?). For now interactive-only until the cadence is set.
interactive_only_reason: Cadence not yet decided. Promote to bot-pickable after Ray chooses a rhythm.
